description: Queries the M-26-14 data classification audit index (m_26_14-data-classification-requests) using ES|QL. Use to find data streams awaiting a sensitivity determination (state = classification_pending) or to review completed classifications. Each classification_pending record is a potential POA&M item under Appendix A incidental sensitive-data exposure / Log Management.

configuration.query: FROM m_26_14-data-classification-requests | WHERE state == ?state | KEEP index_name, state, @timestamp, submitted_by, data_steward | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT ?limit

state.description: Classification state to filter on. Valid values: classification_pending, classified. Use classification_pending to surface open gaps.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return. Default: 50.
